creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
Hi,

I'm now making some test  with the last wml release  (wml-2.0.12).
This new version compiles under FreeBSD 'out of the box',
and, as I can see, solves the problem reported in the PR.

I just want to take a closer look inside the test sequence,
cause sometimes one of the test fails. I think this PR and
the port update can be done before the next year ;)

Cheers,
Rodrigo
